name: SimpleCalculatorAgent
description: A simple Strands agent with a calculator tool, hosted on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime. It can evaluate mathematical expressions and explain calculations step by step.

skills.name: Calculator
skills.description: Evaluate a mathematical expression and return the result. Supports basic arithmetic operations including addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, and parentheses.

httpAuthSecurityScheme.description: AWS SigV4 request signing (default IAM auth)
Cognito JWT bearer token (optional auth mode)
